name: Duy Hoang Khuong
self_description_detail: Hello! I am a recent Artificial Intelligence graduate from FPT University. I am deeply passionate about solving real-world problems and am currently building my research experience in robust computer vision. My work spans across medical imaging diagnosis, industrial anomaly detection, representation learning, long-tailed learning, and distribution shift.

I am very grateful to have received a 70% Merit Scholarship during my studies at FPT University. My research journey has been a wonderful learning experience, earning several encouraging recognitions, including multiple awards at various FPT Student Research Festivals and a Best Paper Award at FETC 2025. I always look forward to collaborating with and learning from the international research community.
"One must still have chaos in oneself to be able to give birth to a dancing star." - Friedrich Nietzsche, Thus Spoke Zarathustra
